finding_results.notes: Replaced the blue plastic sobriety medallion with a distinct worn bronze thirty-month sobriety coin, preserving the sobriety beat while removing overlap with the canonical chapter_07 blue day-one chip.

The photo attempt now carries durable penalties: incident notation on Marisol's badge, conservation-bay access narrowed pending written clearance, records route forced through Nora with overnight compliance hold, and shelf-location data withheld by Ada pending clearance.
Added sustained embodied aftershock at the reveal crest and carried physiological/emotional fallout through the immediate aftermath before process instructions and database workflow take over.

summary: Revised chapter_04 resolves all packet findings by repairing the sobriety-object continuity conflict, adding a persistent causal penalty after the protocol breach, and strengthening embodied post-reveal fallout without softening scene pressure or breaking chapter-boundary continuity.
